item.title: Markets Rally, But Jash Engineering Ltd Sinks to 52-Week Low in Stock-Specific Sell-Off
item.description: Despite a broader market rally, Jash Engineering Ltd has plunged to a fresh 52-week low of Rs 336.85 on 23 Mar 2026, marking a steep intraday decline of 8.93%. This sharp fall comes amid persistent quarterly losses and valuation concerns that continue to weigh heavily on the stock. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Markets Rally, But Brand Concepts Ltd Sinks to 52-Week Low in Stock-Specific Sell-Off
item.description: Despite a broad market rebound in some sectors, Brand Concepts Ltd has plunged to a fresh 52-week low of Rs 213.5 on 23 Mar 2026, extending its recent downward trajectory amid persistent financial headwinds. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Five Consecutive Losses Push Sanstar Ltd to a New 52-Week Low
item.description: Sanstar Ltd’s share price touched a fresh 52-week low on 23 March 2026, closing near Rs 77, marking a significant decline amid a sustained downward trend. The stock has underperformed its sector and broader market indices, reflecting ongoing concerns about the company’s financial performance and market positioning. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Five Consecutive Losses Push Credo Brands Marketing Ltd to a New 52-Week Low
item.description: For the fifth consecutive session, Credo Brands Marketing Ltd has closed lower, slipping to within 2.74% of its 52-week low at Rs 71.06 on 23 Mar 2026. This persistent decline has dragged the stock down by nearly 3.92% over the last three days, signalling sustained selling pressure despite a sector that has also been under strain. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Markets Rally, But Suraj Estate Developers Ltd Sinks to 52-Week Low in Stock-Specific Sell-Off
item.description: Despite a broader market rally, Suraj Estate Developers Ltd has plunged to a fresh 52-week low, closing near Rs 184.5 on 23 Mar 2026. This decline comes amid persistent selling pressure that has dragged the stock down by over 43% in the past year, far underperforming the Sensex’s modest 5.5% fall over the same period. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Markets Rally, But Allcargo Terminals Ltd Sinks to 52-Week Low in Stock-Specific Sell-Off
item.description: Despite a broad market rebound in some segments, Allcargo Terminals Ltd has succumbed to a fresh wave of selling pressure, hitting a new 52-week low on 23 Mar 2026. The stock’s decline contrasts sharply with pockets of resilience elsewhere, underscoring company-specific concerns that continue to weigh on investor sentiment. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Markets Rally, But PSP Projects Ltd Sinks to 52-Week Low in Stock-Specific Sell-Off
item.description: PSP Projects Ltd’s stock price declined sharply on 23 March 2026, hitting a 52-week low as it closed near Rs 604.05, marking a significant intraday drop of 7.49%. This movement places the stock just 4.48% above its lowest price in the past year, reflecting ongoing pressures within the construction sector and broader market conditions. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Markets Rally, But Nilkamal Ltd Sinks to 52-Week Low in Stock-Specific Sell-Off
item.description: Despite a broad market rebound, Nilkamal Ltd has continued its downward trajectory, hitting a fresh 52-week low near Rs 1111 on 23 Mar 2026. The stock’s recent four-day losing streak has culminated in a 7.52% decline, underscoring persistent selling pressure amid a volatile trading session. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Markets Rally, But IVP Ltd Sinks to 52-Week Low in Stock-Specific Sell-Off
item.description: Despite a broader market rebound in some segments, IVP Ltd has slipped to within 4.5% of its 52-week low, closing near Rs 123.25 on 23 Mar 2026. This decline contrasts sharply with the sector's modest recovery and raises questions about the underlying pressures on the stock. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Markets Rally, But Smartlink Holdings Ltd Sinks to 52-Week Low in Stock-Specific Sell-Off
item.description: Smartlink Holdings Ltd’s stock price declined sharply to touch a 52-week low of Rs 112 on 23 Mar 2026, marking a significant milestone in its ongoing downward trajectory. The stock’s performance reflects persistent pressures amid a challenging market environment and company-specific financial concerns. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Five Consecutive Losses Push Maral Overseas Ltd to a New 52-Week Low
item.description: Maral Overseas Ltd’s stock price reached a fresh 52-week low on 23 March 2026, closing near Rs 36.83, marking a significant decline amid broader market weakness and sectoral underperformance. The stock’s fall reflects ongoing challenges in the garments and apparels sector, compounded by company-specific financial metrics and market sentiment. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Prabha Energy Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 23 Mar 2026
item.description: Prabha Energy Ltd witnessed a sharp intraday decline on 23 Mar 2026, touching a low of Rs 141.5, down 8.47% from the previous close. The stock’s performance lagged significantly behind its sector and broader market indices, reflecting heightened selling pressure and subdued market sentiment in the oil sector and small-cap space. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Markets Rally, But Everest Kanto Cylinder Ltd Sinks to 52-Week Low in Stock-Specific Sell-Off
item.description: While broader indices have shown signs of recovery, Everest Kanto Cylinder Ltd has continued its downward trajectory, touching a fresh 52-week low near Rs 97 on 23 Mar 2026. This decline comes amid a market environment where the Nifty itself is hovering close to its own 52-week low, but the stock’s underperformance remains notably sharper and more pronounced. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Godrej Agrovet Ltd. Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 23 Mar 2026
item.description: Godrej Agrovet Ltd. experienced a significant intraday decline on 23 Mar 2026, touching a low of Rs 545, down 7.44% from the previous close. This underperformance was notably sharper than the broader FMCG sector and the Sensex, reflecting immediate price pressures and subdued market sentiment. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Dollar Industries Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 23 Mar 2026
item.description: Dollar Industries Ltd experienced a significant intraday decline on 23 Mar 2026, touching a low of Rs 240.6, down 7.16% from its previous close. The stock underperformed both its sector and broader market indices amid widespread bearish sentiment and persistent selling pressure. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Markets Rally, But Vidhi Specialty Food Ingredients Ltd Sinks to 52-Week Low in Stock-Specific Sell-Off
item.description: Despite a broader market rebound, Vidhi Specialty Food Ingredients Ltd has slipped to a fresh 52-week low, closing near Rs 262 on 23 Mar 2026. This decline comes amid persistent underperformance relative to the sector and key indices, signalling ongoing headwinds for the small-cap specialty chemicals player. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Sasken Technologies Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure
item.description: Sasken Technologies Ltd experienced a significant intraday decline on 23 Mar 2026, touching a low of Rs 1086, down 7.34% from the previous close. The stock underperformed its sector and broader market indices amid heightened volatility and prevailing bearish sentiment in the small-cap segment. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Indian Bank Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 23 Mar 2026
item.description: Indian Bank’s shares declined sharply today, touching an intraday low of Rs 830.45, down 5.43% as the stock underperformed both its sector and broader market indices amid widespread selling pressure in public sector banks and a bearish market environment. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Max Financial Services Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure
item.description: Max Financial Services Ltd experienced significant intraday volatility on 23 Mar 2026, hitting a low of Rs 1,553.45, marking a decline of 5.17% from its previous close. The stock underperformed both its sector and the broader market amid widespread bearish sentiment and downward pressure across financial indices. Time: 2 hours ago
